Argument.Name: text
Argument.Description: The text prompt sent to the specified model. Potentially preceded/surrounded by a prompt template if one has been defined.

Option.Description: Forces chat mode (continuous conversation) in cases where the input would otherwise be written to console/stdout
Clears the current profile and resets the config to default values
Shows the current profile settings saved in application configuration
Print a template in ps-gpt's template folder
Sets a value in current profile. E.g. --set-profile model=gpt-3
Set a template in ps-gpt's template folder to the content specified in input text or pipeline.
Commands the api with a 'system' type message before initializing the actual conversation
A file path pointing to a template file. Template file is used as a wrapper for text content. '{text}' in templates is replaced with the text prompt
